0.text: Irregularly circumscribed patchy-nodular consolidations with air bronchograms in all segments of the right lung

1.text: Irregularly circumscribed patchy-nodular consolidations with air bronchograms in the lower lobe of the left lung

2.text: Largest consolidation area in the basal region of the right lower lobe, measuring 102x36 mm

3.text: Ground-glass halo surrounding some of the consolidations
